Container.Name: readwise-remarkable
Container.Overview: Automatically sync documents from Readwise Reader to your reMarkable tablet via rmapi. Removes archived/seen items. Optionally syncs weekly Economist PDF. Syncs highlights from reMarkable back to Readwise.
Container.Description: Syncs Readwise Reader articles to reMarkable tablet. Unseen documents from configured locations get uploaded as EPUBs/PDFs. Archived or seen items are automatically removed from reMarkable. Optionally syncs weekly Economist PDF from GitHub.

Config.Name: Readwise Token
Config.Description: Your Readwise access token from https://readwise.io/access_token

Config.Name: reMarkable Folder
Config.Description: Folder on reMarkable where documents are uploaded

Config.Name: Sync Locations
Config.Description: Readwise locations to sync from (comma-separated: new,later,shortlist,feed)

Config.Name: Sync Tag
Config.Description: Tag to filter by (* for all documents)

Config.Name: Economist Enabled
Config.Description: Enable weekly Economist PDF sync — saves to Readwise Reader, then synced to reMarkable

Config.Name: Highlight Sync
Config.Description: Sync highlights from reMarkable back to Readwise (EPUBs and PDFs)

Config.Name: Persistent Data
Config.Description: Stores rmapi auth token and export tracker
